title: Bump  google.golang.org/grpc to v1.79.3 - CVE-2026-33186
body: Even though it appears that Skopeo is not affected by CVE-2026-33186, I have been pinged about it already.  Just to keep the CVE sniffers at bay, bump to the appropriate version of gRPC.

comments.body: Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.
